experience.summary: Architecting complete product design, full stack development, and quality assurance strategy while managing company-wide testing infrastructure.
highlights: Designed complete front-end UI for web and mobile applications from scratch
Collaborated with UI/UX designers and front-end developers
Created accessible and user-centric product interfaces
Designed backend systems focusing on security and performance
Managed quality assurance across the entire organization
Led seven cross-functional teams to achieve zero-complaint operations
Managed company-wide testing infrastructure as the sole QA engineer

achievements.title: Zero Complaint Operations
achievements.description: Led seven cross-functional teams and maintained zero customer complaints through robust QA systems.

achievements.title: Single-Handed QA Leadership
achievements.description: Managed and architected the entire company testing infrastructure as the sole QA engineer.

experience.about: This hybrid role combines full stack development, product design, and SDET expertise. I architect complete product experiences from frontend interfaces to backend systems while ensuring high-quality standards through robust testing infrastructure. As the sole QA engineer managing company-wide testing, I successfully led seven cross-functional teams to achieve zero-complaint operations. My work ensures scalable systems, secure backend architecture, and user-centric design across all platforms.
